subject: chemistry
title: 22M.1.HL.TZ2.7
question_html:
Which of these ions are likely to be paramagnetic?

I.   Ti3+
II.  Cr3+
III. Fe3+


A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III
examiners_html: Half of the candidates selected the correct combination of paramagnetic ions. The most commonly chosen distractor excluded Ti3+.
